meta.title: Rule of 4 — Two Cards to Come
meta.description: Use the Rule of 4 to estimate probabilities with two cards to come.

blocks.content:
## Rule of 4 — Two Cards to Come

You're on the flop with two cards to come. Multiply your outs by 4 to estimate your probability of hitting by the river. With two chances to catch your card, those odds add up fast!

blocks.title: Rule of 4 Drill
blocks.instructions: You are on the flop (two cards to come). Given the number of outs, use the Rule of 4 to estimate the probability of completing your draw by the river.
